



1. Crear archivo hana_license.txt

cat > /tmp/hana_license.txt << 'EOF'
----- Begin SAP License -----
SAPSYSTEM=NDB
HARDWARE-KEY=Z0424499737
INSTNO=0020948318
BEGIN=20260415
EXPIRATION=20260731

SWPRODUCTNAME=SAP-HANA-ENF
SWPRODUCTLIMIT=0000000064
SYSTEM-NR=000000000850929529
EOF


2. Verificar contenido de archivo hana_license.txt
cat /tmp/hana_license.txt


3. Aplicar la licencia

sles:/tmp # su - ndbadm
ndbadm@sles:/usr/sap/NDB/HDB00> hdbsql -u SYSTEM -p Va3qaLMyk5Zc04XK -d SYSTEMDB \
>   "SET SYSTEM LICENSE '$(cat /tmp/hana_license.txt)'"
0 rows affected (overall time 178.073 msec; server time 177.875 msec)

ndbadm@sles:/usr/sap/NDB/HDB00>

 
4. Verificación:
hdbsql -u SYSTEM -p Va3qaLMyk5Zc04XK -d SYSTEMDB \
  "SELECT SYSTEM_ID, HARDWARE_KEY, INSTALL_NO, START_DATE, EXPIRATION_DATE, VALID FROM M_LICENSE"

Resultado: 

SYSTEM_ID,HARDWARE_KEY,INSTALL_NO,START_DATE,EXPIRATION_DATE,VALID
"NDB","Z0424499737","0020948318","2026-04-15 00:00:00.000000000","2026-07-31 23:59:59.999999000","TRUE"
lines 1-2/2 (END)
